business_ideas.idea: Deets: reviews from friends and influencers, not strangers. Replaces Yelp with look-alike modeling.
Middle.net: find meeting location between two people using GPS location data.
Funcontact: QR code based contact sharing app, swap info at events easily.
Bipolar Social Club: clothing brand for bipolar community to destigmatize mental illness.
Fix TSA and airport experience: make flying more secure and efficient.
Twitter competitor focused on kindness without trolls or misinformation.

predictions.text: Someone will create better Twitter alternative than Elon's version with focus on community values.
